name: agentic-qa-workflow
description: Delegate implementation work while the parent Codex agent keeps responsibility for planning, QA, review, and final verification.

interface.longDescription: A Codex skill for splitting implementation work into serial worktree branches, delegating focused slices, reviewing returned diffs and tests, and keeping final quality responsibility with the parent agent.
defaultPrompt: Use $delegate-implementation to delegate this implementation with parent QA.
